explanation: This LTL property states that globally, whenever the system is in the NOMINAL state and the sensor data is not good, then the autopilot must change states to MANEUVER.

This LTL property states that globally, if the sensor data is not good, then the autopilot will eventually transition to the MANEUVER state. The property uses template 19 which is G(bool_exp2 -> (F bool_exp3)). The bool_exp2 is "!good" indicating the sensor data is bad. bool_exp3 is "state_is_MANEUVER" which means the autopilot is in the MANEUVER state.

The LTL property states that it is always the case that if the autopilot is in the NOMINAL state and the sensor data is not good, then eventually the autopilot will transition to MANEUVER state.  bool_exp1 is state_is_NOMINAL, bool_exp2 is good, and bool_exp3 is state_is_MANEUVER.  N_DURATION is set to 1 to make the time window the shortest possible.
